title: Life's Mystery
content:
I live, I move, I know not how, nor why,
        Float as a transient bubble on the air,
    As fades the eventide I, too, must die;
        I came, I know not whence; I journey, where?
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Alfred Castner King delivers a powerful performance in "Life's Mystery"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
